minSlash.Wiki: The minimum value for slash defence.

minThrust.Wiki: The minimum value for thrust defence.

minStrike.Wiki: The minimum value for strike defence.

minPhysical.Wiki: The minimum value for physical defence.

minMagic.Wiki: The minimum value for magic defence.

minThunder.Wiki: The minimum value for lightning defence.

minFire.Wiki: The minimum value for fire defence.

minDark.Wiki: The minimum value for dark defence.

minPoison.Wiki: The minimum value for poison defence.

minBleeding.Wiki: The minimum value for bleed defence.

minPetrifaction.Wiki: The minimum value for petrification defence.

minCurse.Wiki: The minimum value for curse defence.

maxSlash.Wiki: The maximum value for slash defence.

maxThrust.Wiki: The maximum value for thrust defence.

maxStrike.Wiki: The maximum value for strike defence.

maxPhysical.Wiki: The maximum value for physical defence.

maxMagic.Wiki: The maximum value for magic defence.

maxThunder.Wiki: The maximum value for lightning defence.

maxFire.Wiki: The maximum value for fire defence.

maxDark.Wiki: The maximum value for dark defence.

maxPoison.Wiki: The maximum value for poison defence.

maxBleeding.Wiki: The maximum value for bleed defence.

maxPetrifaction.Wiki: The maximum value for petrification defence.

maxCurse.Wiki: The maximum value for curse defence.

maxLevel.Wiki: The maximum value for reinforcement level.

menuResistanceScale.Wiki: The defence power correction scale to use within the menu. Display only.

reinforceCost.Wiki: The reinforcement cost parameters to use.
